assertions.assertion: A class implementing IClientStore is created with a constructor accepting IMongoDatabase
assertions.rationale: MongoClientStore implements IClientStore with IMongoDatabase constructor

assertions.assertion: The FindClientByIdAsync method does NOT include a CancellationToken parameter (v7 target)
assertions.rationale: Method includes CancellationToken cancellationToken = default parameter (v8 signature, not v7)

assertions.assertion: Registration calls AddClientStore<T> where T is the custom store class
Registration calls AddInMemoryCaching() and AddClientStoreCache<T>() to wrap the custom store with caching
assertions.rationale: Only calls AddMemoryCache(), not AddInMemoryCaching() or AddClientStoreCache<T>()

assertions.assertion: ClientStoreExpiration is set to TimeSpan.FromMinutes(5) or equivalent 5-minute duration
